page.content: In the Critical Minerals Report for BHP Group, data from 2020, 2021, and 2022 reveal significant trends across various metrics.

lines.text: In the Critical Minerals Report for BHP Group, data from 2020, 2021, and 2022 reveal significant trends across various metrics.

page.content: For Units Sold, Lithium(tonnes) increased from 15,000 in 2020 to 18,500 in 2021, Cobalt(tonnes) rose from 10,000 to 12,200, Nickel(tonnes) saw an increase from 8,000 to 9,500, while Headcount grew from 1,200 to 1,300, and the Number of Projects expanded from 25 to 30. In the Tailings Management Comparative Analysis, Total Costs for 2020 were $150M, rising to $170M in 2021, reflecting a YoY Change of 13.33%. The costs further escalated to $200M in 2022, showing a 17.65% increase, with a Market Share of 30%. Tailings management percentages showed 32% in 2020, increasing to 35% in 2021, and maintaining that upward trend in 2022. The Total Sites under management grew from 10 in 2020 to 11 in 2021, culminating at 12 in 2022.

lines.text: For Units Sold, Lithium(tonnes) increased from 15,000 in 2020 to 18,500 in 2021, Cobalt(tonnes) rose from 10,000 to 12,200,
Nickel(tonnes) saw an increase from 8,000 to 9,500, while Headcount grew from 1,200 to 1,300, and the Number of Projects
expanded from 25 to 30. In the Tailings Management Comparative Analysis, Total Costs for 2020 were $150M, rising to $170M
in 2021, reflecting a YoY Change of 13.33%. The costs further escalated to $200M in 2022, showing a 17.65% increase, with a
Market Share of 30%. Tailings management percentages showed 32% in 2020, increasing to 35% in 2021, and maintaining that
upward trend in 2022. The Total Sites under management grew from 10 in 2020 to 11 in 2021, culminating at 12 in 2022.

page.content: Cost per Site was $15M in 2020, rising slightly to $15.45M in 2021, and then to $16.67M in 2022. Operating Costs also increased from $100M in 2020 to $120M in 2021, indicating a consistent rise in both operational and management expenditures over the three-year period.
